zh-CN: 暂无自动化规则，创建第一个吧！
en-US: No automations yet. Create your first one!

zh-CN: 查看执行历史和操作详情
en-US: View execution history and action details

zh-CN: 当新记录被创建时触发
en-US: Triggers when a new record is created
Triggers when a record is updated

zh-CN: 当指定字段的值发生变化时触发
en-US: Triggers when a specific field value changes

zh-CN: 当记录从一个状态转换到另一个状态时触发
en-US: Triggers when a record transitions between states

zh-CN: 按 Cron 表达式定时触发
当收到外部 Webhook 请求时触发
en-US: Triggers when an external webhook is received

zh-CN: 更新指定记录的字段值
en-US: Update field values of a specific record

zh-CN: 执行一个已定义的命令
调用外部 API 接口
向外部系统发送 Webhook 请求
en-US: Send a webhook to an external system

zh-CN: 启动一个 BPM 工作流程
根据表达式结果走不同分支
en-US: Branch based on an expression result

zh-CN: 等待指定时间后继续执行
en-US: Wait for a specified duration before continuing

zh-CN: 遍历集合中的每个元素执行操作
en-US: Iterate over each item in a collection

zh-CN: 选择要操作的数据模型
en-US: Select the data model to operate on

zh-CN: 留空表示监听所有字段变更
en-US: Leave empty to watch all field changes

zh-CN: 留空表示匹配任意原始值
en-US: Leave empty to match any original value

zh-CN: 留空表示匹配任意目标值
en-US: Leave empty to match any target value

zh-CN: 留空表示匹配任意原始状态
en-US: Leave empty to match any source state

zh-CN: 留空表示匹配任意目标状态
en-US: Leave empty to match any target state

zh-CN: 标准 5 位 Cron 表达式（分 时 日 月 周）
en-US: Standard 5-field cron expression (min hour day month weekday)

zh-CN: 超过此时间（秒）自动终止执行
en-US: Auto-terminate execution after this many seconds

zh-CN: 用于验证 Webhook 请求签名
en-US: Used to verify webhook request signatures

zh-CN: Webhook 请求必须包含这些请求头
en-US: Webhook request must include these headers

zh-CN: JSON 格式的字段值映射
en-US: JSON mapping of field values to update

zh-CN: JSON 格式的新记录字段值
en-US: JSON mapping of field values for the new record

zh-CN: 关联到流程实例的业务标识
en-US: Business identifier for the process instance

zh-CN: JSON 格式的流程启动变量
返回 true/false 的表达式
en-US: Expression that evaluates to true or false

zh-CN: 循环中当前元素的变量名
en-US: Variable name for the current item in the loop

zh-CN: 选择一个节点进行配置
实时 SLA 状态概览
加载 SLA 监控数据失败
en-US: Failed to load SLA monitor data

zh-CN: 加载 SLA 记录失败
导入失败，请检查文件格式是否正确
en-US: Import failed, please check the file format

zh-CN: 请选择 JSON 格式的流程定义文件
en-US: Please select a JSON process definition file

zh-CN: 流程必须包含至少一个开始节点
en-US: Process must contain at least one start event

zh-CN: 流程只能包含一个开始节点
en-US: Process can only contain one start event

zh-CN: 流程必须包含至少一个结束节点
en-US: Process must contain at least one end event

zh-CN: 开始节点 "{label}" 不能有输入连线
en-US: Start event "{label}" must not have incoming edges

zh-CN: 开始节点 "{label}" 必须有输出连线
en-US: Start event "{label}" must have outgoing edges

zh-CN: 结束节点 "{label}" 不能有输出连线
en-US: End event "{label}" must not have outgoing edges

zh-CN: 结束节点 "{label}" 必须有输入连线
en-US: End event "{label}" must have incoming edges

zh-CN: 任务节点 "{label}" 缺少输入连线
en-US: Task node "{label}" is missing incoming edges

zh-CN: 任务节点 "{label}" 缺少输出连线
en-US: Task node "{label}" is missing outgoing edges

zh-CN: 网关 "{label}" 必须有输入连线
排他网关 "{label}" 至少需要两条输出连线
en-US: Exclusive gateway "{label}" requires at least two outgoing edges

zh-CN: 排他网关 "{label}" 至多只能有一条默认流向，当前有 {count} 条
en-US: Exclusive gateway "{label}" can have at most one default flow, found {count}

zh-CN: 排他网关 "{label}" 的出边 "{edgeLabel}" 缺少条件表达式（每条出边都必须填写可求值的表达式，引擎不支持仅靠默认流向兜底）
en-US: Outgoing edge "{edgeLabel}" of exclusive gateway "{label}" is missing a condition expression (every outgoing flow must carry an evaluable expression; engine does not honor bare default-flow fallback)

zh-CN: 请选择一个节点或连线以配置属性
en-US: Select a node or edge to configure properties

zh-CN: 确定要删除这个节点吗？
en-US: Are you sure you want to delete this node?

zh-CN: 确定要删除这条连线吗？
en-US: Are you sure you want to delete this edge?

zh-CN: 默认流向在其他条件均不满足时执行
en-US: The default flow is taken when no other condition is met

zh-CN: 流程标识创建后不可修改
en-US: Process key cannot be changed after creation

zh-CN: 任务将自动分配给流程发起人
en-US: Task will be automatically assigned to the process initiator

zh-CN: 使用 ${expression} 格式引用流程变量
en-US: Use ${expression} format to reference process variables

zh-CN: ISO 8601 持续时间或日期时间

en-US: Leave empty to use collection variable

zh-CN: 无法将表达式解析为简单规则，请继续使用高级模式编辑。
en-US: Cannot parse the expression into simple rules. Please continue editing in advanced mode.

zh-CN: 使用 ${expression} 格式，支持 &&, ||, ==, !=, >, < 运算符
当所有条件均不满足时，流程将沿默认流向继续
en-US: When no condition is met, the process continues along the default flow

zh-CN: 并行网关：所有出口路径同时执行
en-US: Parallel Gateway: All outgoing paths execute simultaneously

zh-CN: 合流时的完成条件，用于控制等待多少个入口分支完成后继续执行
en-US: Completion condition for join behavior. Controls how many incoming branches must complete before continuing

zh-CN: 暂无已部署的流程定义
输入映射 (父流程 → 子流程)
输出映射 (子流程 → 父流程)

en-US: Task waiting to receive a message

zh-CN: 条件分支，只能选择一条路径
en-US: Conditional branch, only one path is selected

zh-CN: 并行分支，所有路径同时执行
en-US: Parallel branch, all paths execute simultaneously

zh-CN: 条件分支，满足条件的路径都执行
en-US: Conditional branch, all matching paths execute

zh-CN: 用自然语言描述业务需求，AI 自动生成完整的模块配置
en-US: Describe your business needs in natural language, AI generates complete module configuration

zh-CN: 描述您的业务模块需求
例如：我需要一个客户管理模块，包含公司名称、联系人、电话、邮箱、行业分类和跟进记录...
en-US: e.g. I need a customer management module with company name, contacts, phone, email, industry classification and follow-up records...

zh-CN: AI 正在分析需求并生成配置...
en-US: AI is analyzing requirements and generating configuration...

zh-CN: 例如：把状态字段改成下拉框、添加一个备注字段...
en-US: e.g. Change status field to dropdown, add a notes field...

zh-CN: 模块已创建并激活，您可以在菜单中找到它
en-US: Module has been created and activated. You can find it in the menu.
